summary: Enhanced financial dashboard testing complete. All features verified: Backend 8/8 tests passed (100%), Frontend UI verified via Playwright. Dashboard shows Financial Summary card with 4 colored boxes, Payment Breakdown chart with 3 bars, metric cards for deposits/paid/revenue. Deposit-verified email contains non-refundable policy notice and secure /payment/{token} upload link.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial dashboard enhancements fully verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/dashboard returns metrics with total_deposit_collected, total_balance_collected, total_revenue_collected, total_deposit_expected, total_balance_expected. Charts include payment_breakdown array with monthly deposits, final_payments, outstanding values. Deposit-verified email (triggered when payment_status=Verified) includes AVISO IMPORTANTE/IMPORTANT NOTICE with non-refundable policy and /payment/{token} link.

dashboard_metrics.total_deposit_collected: Sum of deposits from bookings with payment_status=Verified
dashboard_metrics.total_balance_collected: Sum of balances from bookings with final_payment_status=Verified
dashboard_metrics.total_deposit_expected: Sum of all expected deposits from active bookings
dashboard_metrics.total_balance_expected: Sum of all expected balances from active bookings
dashboard_metrics.deposits_pending: Count of bookings with overall_payment_status=Deposit Pending
dashboard_metrics.paid_in_full: Count of bookings with overall_payment_status=Paid in Full

dashboard_charts.payment_breakdown: Array of {month, deposits, final_payments, outstanding} for bar chart
dashboard_charts.capacity_breakdown: Pie chart: Confirmed, Reserved, Remaining slots
dashboard_charts.dog_status_breakdown: Pie chart: status counts (In Training, Delivered, etc.)

frontend_financial_summary_card.outstanding_box: Yellow border/bg, shows outstanding = expected - collected

payment_breakdown_chart.title: Desglose de pagos por mes / Payment breakdown by month

booking_detail_dialog.overall_payment_status: Badge showing Deposit Pending/Verified, Balance Pending, or Paid in Full

reservations_table.overall_payment_status_column: Shows payment status badge for each booking

deposit_verified_email.spanish_policy: AVISO IMPORTANTE: El depósito no es reembolsable una vez procesado...
deposit_verified_email.english_policy: IMPORTANT NOTICE: The deposit is non-refundable once processed...
deposit_verified_email.payment_link: Contains /payment/{token} URL for final payment upload

screenshots: /app/test_reports/iteration14_dashboard_financial.jpeg - Dashboard with Financial Summary card and Payment Breakdown chart
/app/test_reports/iteration14_booking_detail.jpeg - Booking detail dialog showing deposit_amount and balance_amount
